actual._protocol: mauve.compute_mauve(num_buckets='auto', seed=42, featurize_model_name=None) on 1024-d MERT-v1-330M time-mean embeddings against SDD-706 reference

verified_against_paper.status: VERIFIED on 2026-06-10. Both backbones recomputed under unified protocol (mauve.compute_mauve, num_buckets='auto', seed=42) against the canonical sao_small_n30_lr05_paper and ditto_tangoflux_100 wav files. TangoFlux ΔMAD shifted -0.027 from prior -2.241 (seed=25 mauve default) to -2.214 (seed=42 for cross-cell consistency). SAO ΔMAD corrected from prior -0.418 (untraceable to any reasonable MAUVE config) to +0.500, reflecting actual three-axis reward-exploitation pattern. Paper Table 5 and §5.2 narrative updated accordingly.

verified_against_paper.claim: §5.2 Mode 2 TangoFlux reward (Table 5 top): Base, After, ΔRwd, Win — full 100-prompt reproducer (previously BLOCKED on GPU memory; fixed via PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True)

verified_against_paper.claim: §5.3 Mode 3 expert iteration ΔCLAP (Table 5 bottom): lr sweep + multi-round
verified_against_paper._protocol: LAION-CLAP-Music music_audioset_epoch_15_esc_90.14, unprefixed SDD captions from eval/prompts/sdd100.json (matches Mode 2 compute_clap_delta.py convention), canonical no-postproc wav dirs
verified_against_paper.status: VERIFIED on 2026-06-11. Prior paper Table 5 values (-0.009/-0.021/-0.040) unreproducible under any protocol variant (prefix/raw x plain/3xmdx/lufsm165 all positive); paper Table 5, §5.1, §5.3 and this repo's mode3 README corrected to the reproducible positive deltas. Reward-exploitation narrative now carried by MAD alone.
verified_against_paper._env: Canonical numeric env for all published CLAP/reward numbers: torch 2.4.0, torchaudio 2.4.0, transformers 4.44.0, laion_clap 1.1.6 (functionally identical to pinned 1.1.7; only diff is a torch.load weights_only flag), NVIDIA RTX A5000. Under torch 2.7.1 / transformers 4.57.6, CLAP cosines shift ~0.01-0.02 (TangoFlux Mode 2 delta becomes +0.027 vs published +0.043) and Scorer reward means shift ~0.05; Mode 3 raw-protocol CLAP deltas remain positive in both envs.
